# haven — Acknowledgments

Thank you to everyone who has supported and contributed to haven. This project benefits from many people's time, expertise, and generosity.

We'd especially like to acknowledge:

- Community contributors who report issues, provide feedback, and submit pull requests.
- Code and documentation reviewers who help improve quality and clarity.
- Maintainers and core team members for ongoing project stewardship.
- Third-party libraries, tools, and projects that make this work possible (see LICENSE and project docs for details).
- Translators, designers, testers, and users who help make the project more accessible and stable.
- Any organizations or sponsors who provide resources or funding.

How to acknowledge someone:

- Open a pull request adding a short note here with the person's name, contribution, and an optional link to their profile.

Thank you to everyone who helps make haven better.
